## Quick Start

<Tabs syncKey="pkg">
  <TabItem label="pip">
    ```bash
    pip install falcon-mcp
    ```
  </TabItem>
  <TabItem label="uv">
    ```bash
    uv tool install falcon-mcp
    ```
  </TabItem>
</Tabs>
